name: JUNIATA VALLEY FINANCIAL CORP
summary: Juniata Valley Financial Corp. is a Pennsylvania bank holding company formed in 1983, operating through its subsidiary The Juniata Valley Bank (chartered 1867). It provides retail and commercial banking, trust, asset management, and estate services across 14 branch locations in central and northern Pennsylvania. Services include checking accounts, loans, certificates of deposit, commercial lines of credit, ACH origination, mobile banking, and brokerage services via a broker-dealer arrangement.

products.name: Personal Checking Accounts
products.description: Consumer checking accounts with overdraft privileges and debit cards.

products.name: Money Market Deposit Accounts
products.description: Interest-bearing deposit accounts for consumer customers.

products.name: Certificates of Deposit
products.description: Time deposit products offered to retail and commercial customers.

products.name: Commercial Lines of Credit
products.description: Credit facilities for small and mid-sized business customers.

products.name: Commercial Letters of Credit
products.description: Trade finance instruments for commercial banking customers.

products.name: Construction and Mortgage Loans
products.description: Real estate lending products for consumer customers.

products.name: Online and Mobile Banking
products.description: Digital banking platform including mobile deposit and online account opening.

products.name: Trust and Estate Services
products.description: Comprehensive trust, asset management and estate planning services.

products.name: Remote Deposit and ACH Origination
products.description: Cash management services for business customers including payroll direct deposit.

products.name: Annuities and Brokerage Services
products.description: Financial products including mutual funds, stocks, bonds, and long-term care insurance via broker-dealer.

partnerships.partner_name: Federal Home Loan Bank of Pittsburgh
partnerships.description: Source of borrowings and funding for the Company.
Source of borrowings and funding for the Company.
